I think this is a scam property.   The location shown on Google Maps does not lead to the inn.  The website describes the address as 121 st street and Fifth avenue.  These streets do not cross and this location is in the middle of the parkland.   I called the phone number and the person who answered refused to allow us to visit the property.  When I said "the address on the web site does not exist" the voice on the line said " that is correct we will only tell you how to get there once you book a room. ".  Buyer beware.
Great value. Large, quiet room, very comfortable, in an immaculately maintained townhouse near Central Park. Very close to subway and bus stops.

This is a beautiful old brownstone building in a quiet neighborhood. There are a few guest rooms /suites up a flight of stairs.  The photos are representative of the vintage Victorian decor. I found the room spacious and comfortable.
The modern private bath was excellent and much larger than what one finds in city hotels. The property faces a park and there are many transportation options just steps away. The host is available by text and  responds right away. I would definitely return.
